ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price recorded for the stock on this date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price recorded for the stock on this date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on this date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on this date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of stocks traded on this date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for dividends and stock splits */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of prediction */,
  "y_pred" REAL /* Predicted stock price for the given date */,
  "y_true" REAL /* Actual stock price for the given date */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the stock in the market (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
